_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements definition, proof-of-concept design and execution, technical and commercial assessment, and selection recommendation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.498), RM-T-004 (RM, cosine: 0.496).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.213). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analysis, produce, products, system, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.843 (P=0.868, R=0.820). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Produce target system analysis products." and "Conduct vendor evaluations for data and AI platforms, including requirements def" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.506 > STS 0.213 (gap +0.293). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analysis, produce, products, system, target]. WIDAI terms: [ai, assessment, commercial, concept, conduct, data].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.293 with low STS 0.213. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
